queries.question: Show scores of all exams and quizzes marked by Ms. Brown.
queries.sql:
SELECT Exams.marks as score
FROM Assessors JOIN Subjects ON Assessors.id = Subjects.assessor_id JOIN StudentSubjects ON Subjects.id = StudentSubjects.subject_id JOIN Students ON StudentSubjects.student_id = Students.id JOIN Exams ON Students.id = Exams.student_id
WHERE Assessors.name = "Ms. Brown"
UNION
SELECT Quizzes.points as score
FROM Assessors JOIN Subjects ON Assessors.id = Subjects.assessor_id JOIN StudentSubjects ON Subjects.id = StudentSubjects.subject_id JOIN Students ON StudentSubjects.student_id = Students.id JOIN Quizzes ON Students.id = Quizzes.student_id
WHERE Assessors.name = "Ms. Brown"
queries.sparql:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?assessors a :Assessors .
    ?subjects a :Subjects .
    ?subjects p:hasAssessors ?assessors .
    ?studentsubjects a :StudentSubjects .
    ?studentsubjects p:hasSubjects ?subjects .
    ?students a :Students .
    ?studentsubjects p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?exams a :Exams .
    ?exams p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?exams p:marks ?marks .
    ?assessors p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Ms. Brown")
    BIND(?marks AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?assessors a :Assessors .
    ?subjects a :Subjects .
    ?subjects p:hasAssessors ?assessors .
    ?studentsubjects a :StudentSubjects .
    ?studentsubjects p:hasSubjects ?subjects .
    ?students a :Students .
    ?studentsubjects p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?quizzes a :Quizzes .
    ?quizzes p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?quizzes p:points ?points .
    ?assessors p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Ms. Brown")
    BIND(?points AS ?o0)
  }
}

ambiguous_dsl.question: Show scores of all exams and quizzes marked by Ms. Brown.
ambiguous_dsl.choice_dsl:
PREFIX : <http://ambrosia.example.org/education#>
PREFIX p: <http://ambrosia.example.org/education/prop#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>
CHOICE attachment {
  low: { SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?assessors a :Assessors .
    ?subjects a :Subjects .
    ?subjects p:hasAssessors ?assessors .
    ?studentsubjects a :StudentSubjects .
    ?studentsubjects p:hasSubjects ?subjects .
    ?students a :Students .
    ?studentsubjects p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?exams a :Exams .
    ?exams p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?exams p:marks ?marks .
    BIND(?marks AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?assessors a :Assessors .
    ?subjects a :Subjects .
    ?subjects p:hasAssessors ?assessors .
    ?studentsubjects a :StudentSubjects .
    ?studentsubjects p:hasSubjects ?subjects .
    ?students a :Students .
    ?studentsubjects p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?quizzes a :Quizzes .
    ?quizzes p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?quizzes p:points ?points .
    ?assessors p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Ms. Brown")
    BIND(?points AS ?o0)
  }
} }
  high: { SELECT DISTINCT ?o0 WHERE {
  {
    ?assessors a :Assessors .
    ?subjects a :Subjects .
    ?subjects p:hasAssessors ?assessors .
    ?studentsubjects a :StudentSubjects .
    ?studentsubjects p:hasSubjects ?subjects .
    ?students a :Students .
    ?studentsubjects p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?exams a :Exams .
    ?exams p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?exams p:marks ?marks .
    ?assessors p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Ms. Brown")
    BIND(?marks AS ?o0)
  }
  UNION
  {
    ?assessors a :Assessors .
    ?subjects a :Subjects .
    ?subjects p:hasAssessors ?assessors .
    ?studentsubjects a :StudentSubjects .
    ?studentsubjects p:hasSubjects ?subjects .
    ?students a :Students .
    ?studentsubjects p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?quizzes a :Quizzes .
    ?quizzes p:hasStudents ?students .
    ?quizzes p:points ?points .
    ?assessors p:name ?name_f .
    FILTER(STR(?name_f) = "Ms. Brown")
    BIND(?points AS ?o0)
  }
} }
}
